name: Sauteed Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into slices 1/4-inch thick.
2. Sprinkle salt on the eggplant and let sit for 30 minutes.
3. Rinse the eggplant, squeeze out excess liquid, and pat dry.
4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the eggplant slices and sauté until soft.
5. If more oil is needed, add it to keep the eggplant from sticking.
6. Place the cooked eggplant on paper towels to drain any excess fat.
7. Sprinkle with hot chili powder if desired before serving.
